name: alsalik-pos
description: Point of Sale system by Al Salik Computers

scripts.export-web: cd ../artifacts/pos-app && pnpm exec expo export --platform web --output-dir ../../desktop-installer/www-new --clear
scripts.rebuild-web: rm -rf www && mv www-new www && node shorten-paths.js && mkdir -p dist/win-unpacked/resources/app && rm -rf dist/win-unpacked/resources/app/www && cp -r www dist/win-unpacked/resources/app/www && cp main.js dist/win-unpacked/resources/app/main.js && cp preload.js dist/win-unpacked/resources/app/preload.js && cp api-config.json dist/win-unpacked/resources/app/api-config.json
scripts.rebuild-web-32: mkdir -p dist-32/win-ia32-unpacked/resources/app && rm -rf dist-32/win-ia32-unpacked/resources/app/www && cp -r www dist-32/win-ia32-unpacked/resources/app/www && cp main.js dist-32/win-ia32-unpacked/resources/app/main.js && cp preload.js dist-32/win-ia32-unpacked/resources/app/preload.js && cp api-config.json dist-32/win-ia32-unpacked/resources/app/api-config.json
scripts.build:installer: NSISDIR=$(cd .. && pwd)/.cache/electron-builder/nsis/nsis-3.0.4.1 ../.cache/electron-builder/nsis/nsis-3.0.4.1/linux/makensis -V2 /DAPP_VERSION=$(node -p "require('./package.json').version") installer.nsi && node sign-installers.js 64 && node checksum.js 64
scripts.build:installer-32: NSISDIR=$(cd .. && pwd)/.cache/electron-builder/nsis/nsis-3.0.4.1 ../.cache/electron-builder/nsis/nsis-3.0.4.1/linux/makensis -V2 /DAPP_VERSION=$(node -p "require('./package.json').version") installer-32.nsi && node sign-installers.js 32 && node checksum.js 32
scripts.build:all: pnpm run export-web && pnpm run rebuild-web && pnpm run build:installer
scripts.build:all-32: pnpm run build:win7-32 && pnpm run rebuild-web-32 && pnpm run build:installer-32

build.copyright: © 2025 Al Salik Computers. All rights reserved.
